name: Detect Heartbeat & Timeout
info:
Reacts to heartbeat events on a per-device MQTT subscription.
Sends {payload:'Connected'} immediately; {payload:'Disconnected'} after 90 s silence.

name: Kalman Filter Distance
info:
1-D Kalman filter for BLE/ESP-NOW distance smoothing.
Set STATES_KEY env var on each instance to isolate state between tabs.
